errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalid_input: Please check the fields: some values are invalid or too long.
errors.invalid_slug: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscore only

onboarding_upload.title: Upload your first statement
onboarding_upload.body: zafyros analyzes your finances from your bank statements. Upload them in Excel or CSV; the older it is, the more complete your analysis.

budgets.hint_title: Keep your spending under control with budgets
budgets.hint_body: Set a monthly limit for your categories and avoid surprises at the end of the month. This feature is available on the PRO and PREMIUM plans.

limit_reached.title: You've reached your plan's limit
limit_reached.profiles: Your {{plan}} plan allows up to {{limit}} financial profiles.
limit_reached.accounts: Your {{plan}} plan allows up to {{limit}} connected accounts. Upgrade your plan to keep adding your banks and cards.
limit_reached.imports: Your {{plan}} plan allows up to {{limit}} imports per month.
limit_reached.movements: Your {{plan}} plan allows up to {{limit}} transactions per month.
limit_reached.rules: Your {{plan}} plan allows up to {{limit}} classification rules.
limit_reached.reset_hint: Upgrade your subscription or wait {{days}} days for the counter to reset.
limit_reached.reset_hint_one: Upgrade your subscription or wait 1 day for the counter to reset.

sidebar.trust_body: No bank connection, no more spreadsheets to update by hand: zafyros keeps your finances organized for you.

upgrade_dialog.title: Upgrade your plan
upgrade_dialog.subtitle: More accounts, imports and AI-powered classification whenever you need them.
